productDisplayName: Deni Yo Men Slim Fit Black Jeans
description: Composition Black jeans with a washed look, made of 100% cotton, has two patch pockets on the back with bead detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waist with belt loops and brand patch at the back, embroidered branding on the front right pocket and has metal button and zipper closure on the front Fit Slim fit; Regular rise Wash care Wash inside out separately in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade The manually treated denim with its heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of jeans from deni yo, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. This pair stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressier look. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
